en: Every Saturday, rap attack Mr. Magic Marley Mall I let my tape rock till my tape pop
ko: 매주 토요일, 랩 어택, 미스터 매직, 몰리 몰

en: Smokin' weed and bamboo, sippin' on private stock Way back when I had the red and black lumberjack
With the hat to match Remember rappin' Duke?
ko: 예전에는 빨간색과 검은색의 작업복을 입고 모자도 맞췄지. 기억나? 듀크 랩할 때? 다하, 다하

en: Da-ha, da-ha You never thought that hip-hop would take it this far Now I'm in the limelight cause I rhyme tight
ko: 힙합이 이렇게 멀리 갈 줄은 몰랐지

en: Time to get paid, blow up like the World Trade Born sinner, the opposite of a winner
ko: 돈 벌 시간, 월드 트레이드처럼 터져

en: Remember when I used to eat sardines for dinner?
Peace to Rod G, Brucie B, Kid Capri Fuck Master Flex, love Buckstar Skeet
ko: 로드 G, 브루시 B, 키드 카프리에게 평화

en: I'm blowin' up like you thought I would Call a crib, same number, same hood It's all good
It's all good, yeah And if you don't know, now you know, nigga
You know very well who you are
ko: 너 자신이 누구인지 잘 알고 있었지

en: Don't let him hold you down Reach for the stars
You had a roof, but now it's just a name
ko: 내가 내 이름을 말했을 때 너는 멋졌어

en: Cause you're the only one I met this Sunday
ko: 너는 내가 갑자기 주는 유일한 사람이야
